title: C Programming & Problem Solving (JNTUK R20)
description: JNTUK R20 Year 1 Sem 1 — C programming fundamentals, problem-solving techniques, algorithms, and lab exercises aligned to the JNTUK B.Tech CSE curriculum.

modules.title: Getting Started
modules.description: Introduction and overview of C Programming & Problem Solving (JNTUK R20)

pages.title: C Programming — Course Overview
C Programming — Wiki Index

modules.title: Core Lectures
modules.description: All lectures and concept pages for this course

pages.title: Introduction to C: History, Structure, and First Program
Data Types, Variables, Constants, and Type Conversion in C
Operators and Expressions: Arithmetic, Relational, Logical, Bitwise
Control Flow: if-else, switch, for, while, do-while, break, continue
Functions: Declaration, Definition, Call, Recursion, and Scope
Arrays and Strings: 1D, 2D Arrays, String Functions, and Character Arrays
Pointers: Pointer Arithmetic, Arrays and Pointers, Pointer to Pointer
Structures and Unions: Nested Structures, Pointers to Structures, typedef
File I/O in C: fopen, fclose, fread, fwrite, fprintf, fscanf
Dynamic Memory Allocation: malloc, calloc, realloc, free
Preprocessor Directives: #define, #include, Macros, Conditional Compilation

modules.description: Practice, quizzes, coding, and project pages
